story.title: Our Story
story.p1: PP Plus is an automotive paint manufacturer and distributor established with the goal of elevating automotive paint standards in Thailand, with formulas developed in our own R&D laboratory.
story.p2: Using X-Rite Spectrophotometer and CIEDE2000 color difference system, every formula achieves ΔE ≤ 1.0, guaranteeing the highest precision in color matching for all car brands and models.
story.p3: Our R&D team is committed to developing the highest quality automotive paint products, with every batch tested in our QC laboratory to ensure consistent quality for every customer.
